calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for default judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendant The United Council of Human Services (A Nonprofit Corporation) aka United Council of Human Services.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:15:17 a.m. and concluding at 9:22:40 am. (D505)

Eric Jun, Esq. Appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant The United Council of Human Services (A Nonprofit Corporation) aka United Council of Human Services not appearing.
Witness for Plaintiff Luther Jao was placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed March 13, 2023
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant The United Council of Human Services (a Nonprofit Corporation) aka United Council of Human Services served on April 14, 2023, mailed on April 14, 2023; service effectuated on April 24, 2023
Default entered as to Defendant The United Council of Human Services ( a Nonprofit Corporation) aka United Council of Human Services on May 31, 2023
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 10 on June 27, 2023
Notice of Motion for Prove -up hearing filed September 6, 2023
Notice/proof of service of Prove up hearing date served by mail on October 18, 2023; service effectuated on October 30, 2023.

Plaintiff's counsel to provide brief summary of the case and offer of proof.
The Court addresses plaintiff's witness and confirms that statements declarations made are true and correct. Witness for plaintiff provides testimony.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the court's review:
Exhibit 1: Amended notice of motion and motion for prove- up hearing
Exhibit 2: Request for Court judgment
Exhibit 3: Proposed judgment
Exhibit 4: Declaration pursuant to CCP Sec 585(d) and assignment
Exhibit 5: Declaration of Eric J. Jun
Exhibit 6: Dismissal

Plaintiff's counsel move the exhibits as evidence and the Court accepts.

After reviewing all the evidence, hearing the statements and testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant The United Council of Human Services (A Nonprofit Corporation) aka United Council of Human Services as follows:

Damages $26,661.37
Interest $1,985.60
Attorney's Fees $1,200.00
Costs $831.86

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
